segments.text: Make the tabernacle with ten curtains of finely twisted linen and blue, purple and scarlet yarn, with cherubim woven into them by a skilled worker.
segments.speaker: God

segments.text: All the curtains are to be the same size—twenty-eight cubits long and four cubits wide.
Join five of the curtains together, and do the same with the other five.
segments.speaker: God

segments.text: Make loops of blue material along the edge of the end curtain in one set, and do the same with the end curtain in the other set.
segments.speaker: God

segments.text: Make fifty loops on one curtain and fifty loops on the end curtain of the other set, with the loops opposite each other.
segments.speaker: God

segments.text: Then make fifty gold clasps and use them to fasten the curtains together so that the tabernacle is a unit.
segments.speaker: God

segments.text: Make curtains of goat hair for the tent over the tabernacle—eleven altogether.
segments.speaker: God

segments.text: All eleven curtains are to be the same size—thirty cubits long and four cubits wide.
Join five of the curtains together into one set and the other six into another set. Fold the sixth curtain double at the front of the tent.
segments.speaker: God

segments.text: Make fifty loops along the edge of the end curtain in one set and also along the edge of the end curtain in the other set.
segments.speaker: God

segments.text: Then make fifty bronze clasps and put them in the loops to fasten the tent together as a unit.
segments.speaker: God

segments.text: As for the additional length of the tent curtains, the half curtain that is left over is to hang down at the rear of the tabernacle.
segments.speaker: God

segments.text: The tent curtains will be a cubit longer on both sides; what is left will hang over the sides of the tabernacle so as to cover it.
segments.speaker: God

segments.text: Make for the tent a covering of ram skins dyed red, and over that a covering of the other durable leather.
segments.speaker: God

segments.text: Make upright frames of acacia wood for the tabernacle.
segments.speaker: God

segments.text: Each frame is to be ten cubits long and a cubit and a half wide,
segments.speaker: God

segments.text: with two projections set parallel to each other. Make all the frames of the tabernacle in this way.
segments.speaker: God

segments.text: Make twenty frames for the south side of the tabernacle
segments.speaker: God

segments.text: and make forty silver bases to go under them—two bases for each frame, one under each projection.
segments.speaker: God

segments.text: For the other side, the north side of the tabernacle, make twenty frames
segments.speaker: God

segments.text: and forty silver bases—two under each frame.
segments.speaker: God

segments.text: Make six frames for the far end, that is, the west end of the tabernacle,
segments.speaker: God

segments.text: and make two frames for the corners at the far end.
segments.speaker: God

segments.text: At these two corners they must be double from the bottom all the way to the top and fitted into a single ring; both shall be like that.
segments.speaker: God

segments.text: So there will be eight frames and sixteen silver bases—two under each frame.
segments.speaker: God

segments.text: Also make crossbars of acacia wood: five for the frames on one side of the tabernacle,
segments.speaker: God

segments.text: five for those on the other side, and five for the frames on the west, at the far end of the tabernacle.
segments.speaker: God

segments.text: The center crossbar is to extend from end to end at the middle of the frames.
segments.speaker: God

segments.text: Overlay the frames with gold and make gold rings to hold the crossbars. Also overlay the crossbars with gold.
segments.speaker: God

segments.text: Set up the tabernacle according to the plan shown you on the mountain.
segments.speaker: God

segments.text: Make a curtain of blue, purple and scarlet yarn and finely twisted linen, with cherubim woven into it by a skilled worker.
segments.speaker: God

segments.text: Hang it with gold hooks on four posts of acacia wood overlaid with gold and standing on four silver bases.
segments.speaker: God

segments.text: Hang the curtain from the clasps and place the ark of the covenant law behind the curtain. The curtain will separate the Holy Place from the Most Holy Place.
segments.speaker: God

segments.text: Put the atonement cover on the ark of the covenant law in the Most Holy Place.
segments.speaker: God

segments.text: Place the table outside the curtain on the north side of the tabernacle and put the lampstand opposite it on the south side.
segments.speaker: God

segments.text: For the entrance to the tent make a curtain of blue, purple and scarlet yarn and finely twisted linen—the work of an embroiderer.
segments.speaker: God

segments.text: Make gold hooks for this curtain and five posts of acacia wood overlaid with gold. And cast five bronze bases for them.
segments.speaker: God
